abilities: Show me what you're made of!
Is that the best you can do?
Back at you, brother. (deflecting Hanzo 's Dragonstrike)
Too close to the sun. (deflecting Illari 's Captive Sun)
The storm moves quickly. (deflecting Mei 's Blizzard)
This is not a snowball fight. (deflecting Mei 's Blizzard)
It's too early for death to bloom. (deflecting Reaper 's Death Blossom)
Just like in training. (deflecting Tracer 's Pulse Bomb)
chatter: I still have much to learn.
Mental bearing, not skill, is the sign of a matured warrior.
We will be the lightning that rides the storm.
Our enemies are weak. This is our chance!
We must press our advantage and seize victory!
Our enemies have the upper hand, for now. Let us turn the tables!
Sharpen your resolve. We have it within us to win.
There is no time to dwell on the past. Now, we fight!
After this, there will be only one victor.
It comes to this. Do not falter.
A moment alone before my allies return.
I am strong, but with a team, I am stronger.
I leave flames in my wake!
I will make use of this.
Always there for me, pocket ninja. (healed by Kiriko )
Her work is efficient, as always.
call-outs: I sense the presence of the enemy.
The fight is almost over. Keep defending!
Time works against them. Don't lose focus!
Victory approaches. We must see it through!
There's no time to lose. Attack!
Time is running out. Strike them now!
eliminations: Precision is the way of the effective warrior. (headshot)
The wind blows in my favor.
This is the end for you.
You will not find the answer you seek.
Your choices lead to your fate.
(Japanese: That was no big deal for me.)
A strong wind can fell any tree. (eliminating Tank heroes)
My deadliest enemy, defeated. (eliminating another Genji )
I am victorious this time, brother. (eliminating Hanzo )
Your actions continue to haunt you. (eliminating Hanzo )
(Japanese: Sparrows do not stop singing.) (eliminating Hanzo )
No hint of a breeze. (eliminating Kiriko )
This round is mine, "pocket ninja". (eliminating Kiriko )
No need to check on me, Doctor. (eliminating Mercy )
Early blossoms fall from the tree. (eliminating Reaper )
A bigger blade is not a better one. (eliminating Vendetta )
(Japanese: Even monkeys fall from trees.) (eliminating Winston )
No need to go easy on me, master. (eliminating Zenyatta )
Your focus lacks focus, master. (eliminating Zenyatta )
* relieved sigh * Fate smiles upon me. (on low HP)
That was almost a challenge. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
(Japanese: Cut like the gale!) (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
You fought well, swordsman. Just not well enough. (eliminating another Genji using Dragonblade)
You had the advantage, but I had the edge. (eliminating another Genji that's Nano-Boosted, using Dragonblade)
Your swordwork needs work. (eliminating another Genji using Dragonblade)
You should've stuck with the sword. (eliminating another Genji by Deflecting)
The Kitsune lends its power. (eliminating enemy while assisted by Kiriko 's Kitsune Rush)
I turn your momentum against you. (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
Thank you, Zaryanova! (ally Zarya uses Graviton Surge)
Deflect upon your actions, master. (eliminating Zenyatta with Deflect)
(Japanese) Step by step, walk the thousand mile road.
The winds of death are strong.
(Japanese: Strategy is the craft of the warrior.)
Our enemy has been swept away.
The forest has been cut down.
(Japanese: If you wish ill upon someone, it will fall upon you.)
This is no time to doubt yourself!
I learned that from my brother.
For a moment, you are weightless.
Side by side again, cowboy. (to Cassidy )
Hey, that's my technique! (to another Genji )
Kiriko, you make everything look easy. (to Kiriko )
Teach me that one, master. (to Zenyatta )
interactions: Ana : You're hard to keep a scope on, Genji. Always so unpredictable. Genji : Oh. I'm... sorry? Ana : Don't be. It keeps me sharp.
Ana : I never knew you to be a show-off, Genji. Genji : Only a fool wastes an opportunity.

Anran : I feel like I'm too hard on Wuyang sometimes. Genji : Have you spoken with him about it? Anran : *sigh* No, I'm little scared to find about what he thinks. Genji : Then you know the first step you must take.
Genji: I still feel that final blow from yesterday's training. Brigitte: Aw, come on. I didn't hit you that hard. Genji: If that is the case, our enemies have much to fear.
Cassidy : This one might get tricky. Can I count on you to watch my back? Genji : Of course. You are like a brother to me. Cassidy : You've told me about your family. Not sure that's a compliment.
Genji : You haven't slept. Cassidy : *laugh* Yeah. Was up last night, thinking about who we used to be. Genji : I try to focus on the good times. Cassidy : Hey, yeah. We did have some of those!

Cassidy : All this trouble with Talon ... ever make you think about Blackwatch ? The hurt we caused? Genji : Sometimes. I try to not to let the guilt weigh on me. Cassidy : Wish I could just undo it all. Go back, fix those regrets. Genji : We made mistakes, Cole. Now, all we can do is stand together against them.

Cassidy : Reckon we've got another Bartalotti to stop. Should be easier without all the sneaking around . Genji : And you won't have to speak Italian this time. Cassidy : Well, don't speak so soon, "signore." Genji : Hah. (Japanese: Moron...)

D.Va: Genji, let's go to the arcade after this! Genji: A battle's end calls for meditation. Not games. D.Va: I get it. Everyone's scared to take on the best player in the world... Genji: ...Fine. I'll go.
Doomfist : Who taught you the blade? Genji : The best swordmaster in the world. Doomfist : *tsk* Her ...
Genji : Talon . You are lucky I do not cut you down where you stand. Doomfist : *laugh* We would welcome the challenge.
Genji : My master once taught me: "not all who wander are lost." Freja : *sigh* Save the speech for someone who needs it.
Genji : I live, brother. Why are you still grieving? Hanzo : You were not the only thing I lost.
Genji : It was not easy, living in your shadow. Hanzo : I would have preferred you at my side.
Genji : You cared too much about how the family perceived you. Hanzo : Have you ever been the eldest son?
Hanzo : I have always been bound to my duty. Now, I have nothing. Genji : There is always a way to make something from nothing, brother.
Hanzo : What are you wearing...? Genji : I could ask the same of you.

Genji : You left the Shimada clan behind. Yet, you continue to wield father 's bow. Hanzo : Try as I might, I have found it to impossible to let go. Genji : Of his expectations? Or his legacy? Hanzo : Of hope that I may one day be worthy of returning home.

Hanzo : Kiriko has grown surprisingly capable. But at times, her naïve perspective puts her in danger. Genji : Let her be. She must learn from her own mistakes. Hanzo : You would have me turn a blind eye after how long we left her on her own? Genji : Our absence is what lost us the right to guide her.
Illari : *humming* Genji : Nice melody. Does it have a name? Illari : No, sometimes I just hum when I'm thinking. I can stop. Genji : Humming? Or thinking? Illari : Ugh...

Illari : How did you end up like this? Genji : I refused to walk my family's path. This was the result. Illari : And you still overcame that? Genji : Only when I learned to accept the help I was offered.
Juno : I tried the chicken nuggets you suggested. But... why are they shaped like dinosaurs? Genji : That is what makes them superior.
Kiriko : Remember when you had a bowl cut? Genji : Yes. You didn't want to be the only one. Kiriko : I never had one! Genji : I believe I have pictures.

Kiriko : You should come home, Genji. We need your help. Genji : There are others in the world who need saving. Kiriko : When I was a kid, you said you'd always be there for me. Genji : You are old enough to know it's not that simple.

Kiriko : Ugh, I'd kill for some donuts right about now... Genji : How many have you had today? Kiriko: (one of four): I think, seven. Or, eight... Like... ten? Probably twelve? I... totally lost count. Genji : *sigh* (Japanese: Good grief.)

Kiriko : The Hashimoto have completely overrun Tokyo . It's not much better in Kanezaka , either. Genji : I see how much you need me. But I do not know if the commander will permit my absence. Kiriko : She should open her eyes. If you don't come back now, there won't be anything left.

Genji : I was sorry to hear about your grandmother's passing. It must have been difficult. Kiriko : Yeah... it was right after mom made me quit my miko duties. I couldn't look her in the eye for weeks. Genji : I am glad you've resolved your differences. Not every family can. Kiriko : Me too. Better late than never.
Kiriko: "Swift as the wind", huh, Genji? Genji: Even swifter, thanks to you.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Genji : Yeah... Triceratops. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : I'd get a bigger sword, if I were you. Genji : What counts is the sharpness of the blade and the mind of the wielder. Mauga : I said a bigger sword, not bigger words.
Mei : Genji? Were you the last one in the kitchen? Genji : Yes. I was preparing my meals for the week. Mei : Oh! Well... could you use a knife next time? The sword is a bit messy.
Genji : You are as dangerous as your storm! Mei : That's nice of you to say! I think.

Mercy : Now that Overwatch is back, I insist that you start dressing up for the Halloween parties. Genji : What? I always dress up. Mercy : You can't be 'cyborg ninja' every year. Genji : How about... 'cyborg ninja in a hat'?

Mercy : So... why did we really stop writing? I know my sketch wasn't that terrible. Genji : Conflict got in the way. It is as you say: "war takes every happiness". Mercy : An unfortunate truth. But... we're still friends, aren't we? Genji : Nothing could ever take that from us.

Genji : Angela, have you tried the coffee here? Mercy : Not yet, unfortunately. Genji : It tastes a bit like yours. Although, it's 'dark roast', not 'charred'. Mercy : For your information, I like my coffee burnt.

Genji : It is strange to be here again. Mercy : It's... different. Certainly not the Gibraltar I remember. Genji : If you are missing old times, I could try almost dying again. Mercy : *laugh* You make my job hard enough when you're not trying.
Moira : I could have rebuilt you without all that metal. Genji : And left me a monster, like other creations? Moira : That is a matter of perspective.
Genji : You have an admirable peace about you. Orisa : Things are simple when you protect the innocent. Genji : And when you meet the... less-than-innocent? Orisa : Oh! They get the javelin .
Ramattra : My brother wasted too much of his life teaching you. Genji : I agree. Ramattra : Really? Genji : Yes. And like you, I was undeserving of his patience.
Genji : I have not forgotten your part in Blackwatch . Reaper : What do you want, an apology? Genji : I no longer expect regret from you.
Sojourn : What kind of armor polish do you use, anyway? Genji : I make my own. Sojourn : With... *sniffs* Walnuts? Genji : Among other things.
Genji : My cybernetic form came at great cost. But you asked to change? Sojourn : I learned too young that my body couldn't always keep up with me. Besides... it's hard to turn down rocket legs.

Soldier: 76 : If you knew what Blackwatch was up to, why didn't you stop them? Genji : My vision was clouded by anger. Soldier: 76 : And now the world pays for your actions. Genji : In that, we are the same.
Genji : My sword and your hammer will lead us to victory. Torbjörn : If you can't cut them, nail them!
Venture: You'll like this one: How does a non-binary ninja take out a target? Genji: Uh... how? Venture: They slash them! Genji: Oh. They should try shurikens too.
Winston : Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Genji : I do not.
Wrecking Ball : He asks if you have ever fought in an arena. Genji : No, I have not. Wrecking Ball : He asks if you would like to.
Wuyang : Ugh. My sister gave me an earful yesterday. Wish she could cut me some slack sometimes. Genji : Cherish those moments... You'll miss them when they're gone.
Zarya : You do good work with that blade! Genji : When the path is clear, one walks with confidence.
Genji : Master, how do you maintain your tranquility amid endless battles? Zenyatta : I focus on my breathing. Genji : But... you don't breathe. Zenyatta : Indeed.
map-specific: At times, I can almost hear the voices of those who lost their lives here.
It is not my duty to face the Hashimoto, yet. I cannot bear to walk away.
What has become of my home?
This should be a place of reflection and learning. It saddens me that it is in danger.
